sentence: The primary monitoring dashboard URL is https://dash.internal/ops, though we initially considered https://dash.internal/status before finalizing.
The primary on-call engineer was Alice, who took over from Bob after the shift change.
The incident officially started at 09:45 AM, not 09:30 AM when the first alerts triggered.
The affected service is auth-api-v2, which replaced auth-api-legacy last week.
The incident occurred in the us-west-2 region, while us-east-1 remained stable.
We saw a spike in 503 errors, masking the underlying 502 gateway timeouts.
The total downtime was 45 minutes, significantly worse than our 15-minute SLA.
The root cause was identified as a bad deployment, originally misattributed to a database failover.
Communication happened in the #incidents-p1 Slack channel, moving away from #alerts-general.
The tracking ticket is JIRA-8891, linked to the epic JIRA-8800.
